n: Instance: Hatred of Bear and Man

steps.t: You have come with Langhár to the southern bogs in search of Ofolmóth. She waits to speak with you before continuing to the ruins where your kinsman w…
You have found Ofolmóth, and he wonders if you have come to join him.
Ofolmóth has told you his intentions. He will not abide by the laws of Men. Langhár wishes to speak with you before the fighting begins.
Langhár has been grievously injured, but she is alive.
